mapper.sql: id, staff_id, date, check_in_time, check_out_time, late_min, early_min, status, reason, create_time
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO attendance ( staff_id, date, check_in_time, check_out_time, late_min, early_min, status, reason, create_time ) VALUES
(#{item.staffId}, #{item.date}, #{item.checkInTime}, #{item.checkOutTime}, #{item.lateMin}, #{item.earlyMin}, #{item.status}, #{item.reason}, #{item.createTime})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN a.status = '正常' THEN 1 END) as normalDays, COUNT(CASE WHEN a.status = '迟到' THEN 1 END) as lateDays, COUNT(CASE WHEN a.status = '早退' THEN 1 END) as earlyDays, COUNT(CASE WHEN a.status = '缺勤' THEN 1 END) as absentDays, COUNT(CASE WHEN a.status = '迟到早退' THEN 1 END) as lateEarlyDays, COUNT(CASE WHEN a.status = '缺卡' THEN 1 END) as missingCardDays, COUNT(*) as totalDays FROM attendance a WHERE a.staff_id = #{staffId} AND a.date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate}

SELECT COUNT(*) as totalDays, SUM(CASE WHEN status = '正常' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as normalDays, SUM(CASE WHEN status = '迟到' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as lateDays, SUM(CASE WHEN status = '早退' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as earlyDays, SUM(CASE WHEN status = '迟到早退' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as lateEarlyDays, SUM(CASE WHEN status = '缺卡' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as missingCardDays, SUM(CASE WHEN status = '缺勤' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as absentDays FROM attendance WHERE staff_id = #{staffId} AND DATE_FORMAT(date, '%Y-%m') = #{month}

SELECT d.id as deptId, d.dname as deptName, COUNT(DISTINCT s.id) as totalStaff, COUNT(DISTINCT a.staff_id) as attendedStaff, COUNT(a.id) as totalRecords, SUM(CASE WHEN a.status = '正常' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as normalRecords, SUM(CASE WHEN a.status = '迟到' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as lateRecords, SUM(CASE WHEN a.status = '早退' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as earlyRecords, SUM(CASE WHEN a.status = '迟到早退' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as lateEarlyRecords, SUM(CASE WHEN a.status = '缺卡' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as missingCardRecords, SUM(CASE WHEN a.status = '缺勤' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as absentRecords, CASE WHEN COUNT(a.id) > 0 THEN ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN a.status = '正常' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(a.id), 2) ELSE 0 END as normalRate FROM departments d LEFT JOIN staffs s ON d.id = s.dept_id LEFT JOIN attendance a ON s.id = a.staff_id AND DATE_FORMAT(a.date, '%Y-%m') = #{month} WHERE d.id = #{deptId} GROUP BY d.id, d.dname

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT d.id) as departmentCount, COUNT(DISTINCT s.id) as totalStaff, COUNT(DISTINCT a.staff_id) as attendedStaff, COUNT(a.id) as totalRecords, SUM(CASE WHEN a.status = '正常' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as normalRecords, SUM(CASE WHEN a.status = '迟到' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as lateRecords, SUM(CASE WHEN a.status = '早退' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as earlyRecords, SUM(CASE WHEN a.status = '迟到早退' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as lateEarlyRecords, SUM(CASE WHEN a.status = '缺卡' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as missingCardRecords, SUM(CASE WHEN a.status = '缺勤' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as absentRecords, CASE WHEN COUNT(a.id) > 0 THEN ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN a.status = '正常' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(a.id), 2) ELSE 0 END as normalRate FROM departments d LEFT JOIN staffs s ON d.id = s.dept_id LEFT JOIN attendance a ON s.id = a.staff_id AND DATE_FORMAT(a.date, '%Y-%m') = #{month}

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(date, '%Y-%m-%d') as date, COUNT(*) as totalRecords, SUM(CASE WHEN status = '正常' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as normalCount, SUM(CASE WHEN status = '迟到' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as lateCount, SUM(CASE WHEN status = '早退' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as earlyCount, SUM(CASE WHEN status = '迟到早退' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as lateEarlyDays, SUM(CASE WHEN status = '缺卡' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as missingCardDays, SUM(CASE WHEN status = '缺勤' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as absentCount FROM attendance WHERE DATE_FORMAT(date, '%Y-%m') = #{month} GROUP BY date ORDER BY date

update.foreach: UPDATE attendance SET check_in_time = #{item.checkInTime}, check_out_time = #{item.checkOutTime}, late_min = #{item.lateMin}, early_min = #{item.earlyMin}, status = #{item.status}, reason = #{item.reason} WHERE id = #{item.id}
